name: Grasping Claws
statusOutcome: [AttackerName] suddenly hops towards [TargetName] with surprising quickness, reaching out and scratching [TargetHimOrHer] with [AttackerHisOrHer] claw-like fingernails, making [TargetHimOrHer] gasp in pleasure as a potent aphrodisiac begins to seep into [TargetHisOrHer] body!
statusMiss: [AttackerName] suddenly hops towards [TargetName] with surprising quickness, but [TargetName] easily manages to avoid [AttackerHisOrHer] claw-like fingernails and grasping hands due to [AttackerHisOrHer] stiff limbs.
